name: Tengjun Biotechnology Corp.
summary: Tengjun Biotechnology Corp. does not have significant operations. It intends to evaluate new industry, geographic, and market opportunities in the form of acquiring a business, or being acquired by an existing business or developing a business organically. The company was formerly known as China Herb Group Holdings Corporation and changed its name to Tengjun Biotechnology Corp. in December 2019. Tengjun Biotechnology Corp. was founded in 2010 and is based in Cary, North Carolina.
